description: WorkBuddy Skill 语义索引 — 供语义路由器使用，字段含义见下方 schema

schema.name: skill 名称
schema.description: 供语义向量化的完整描述（中英文）
schema.triggers: 触发关键词列表（兼容旧关键词机制）
schema.priority: 同类 skill 触发优先级（数字越小越优先）

skills.name: code-review
skills.description: 代码质量审查和安全审计，提供可执行的改进建议。覆盖安全漏洞、代码质量、性能、可维护性和测试覆盖五大维度。Code quality review, security audit, bug detection, code analysis.

skills.name: documentation
skills.description: 技术文档生成和维护，创建清晰、完整、可维护的文档。适用于 API 文档、README、接口文档、changelog、注释补充。Technical documentation generation, README, API docs.

skills.name: git-workflow
skills.description: 智能 Git 工作流辅助，生成规范化提交信息、分支策略建议和 PR 描述。Git commit, branch, merge, PR, version management.

skills.name: web-research
skills.description: 深度网络研究和信息整理，生成结构化研究报告。适用于竞品分析、技术调研、行业分析、市场研究。Deep web research, competitive analysis, market research, industry analysis.

skills.name: stock-analyst
skills.description: 基于 AkShare 的智能股票分析，支持 A股/港股/美股 四维分析（技术面/基本面/资金面/消息面）。Stock analysis, technical analysis, fundamental analysis, A-share, HK stock, US stock.

skills.name: memory-consolidation
skills.description: 定期整理和压缩工作记忆，将短期日志提炼为长期记忆，保持记忆系统高效可用。Memory management, log cleanup, memory consolidation.

skills.name: mcp-connector
skills.description: 连接外部服务和工具，实现 GitHub、数据库、Docker、云服务等外部集成。MCP, external service integration, database, Docker, cloud.

skills.name: fusion-workflow-hub
skills.description: 整合 Graphify 知识图谱、ECC 工具集和 OpenClaw 的融合工作流中心，实现深度代码分析、TDD 开发流程和持续学习优化。Knowledge graph, TDD, deep code analysis.

skills.name: neodata-financial-search
skills.description: NeoData 自然语言通用金融数据搜索。查询股票行情、财务报表、基金净值、板块异动、宏观经济、外汇汇率、大宗商品等全品类金融数据，即问即答。Real-time financial data search, stock quotes, financial statements, fund, macro, forex.

skills.name: finance-data-retrieval
skills.description: 通过 209 个结构化 API 接口精确检索金融数据，覆盖股票、指数、期货、债券、基金、宏观经济等 15 大类。Finance data API, structured query, stock data, macro economics, futures, bonds, funds.

skills.name: finance-workflows
skills.description: 财务会计工作流，包含日记账分录、账户对账、利润表生成、差异分析、SOX 合规测试。Financial accounting workflows, journal entries, reconciliation, income statement, variance analysis.

skills.name: dcf-model
skills.description: DCF 折现现金流估值模型，包含 WACC 计算、终值计算、敏感性分析。Discounted cash flow valuation, DCF, WACC, terminal value, sensitivity analysis.

skills.name: comps-analysis
skills.description: 可比公司分析，交易倍数分析，同行业估值对标，EV/EBITDA、P/E 等估值倍数。Comparable company analysis, trading multiples, peer benchmarking, EV/EBITDA, P/E.

skills.name: lbo-model
skills.description: 杠杆收购建模，债务进度表，IRR 回报分析，退出情景分析。Leveraged buyout model, LBO, debt schedule, IRR, exit analysis.

skills.name: cim-builder
skills.description: 构建卖方并购流程的投资备忘录（CIM），组织公司信息为专业投资者材料。Confidential Information Memorandum, CIM, sell-side M&A materials.

skills.name: buyer-list
skills.description: 构建并优先排序潜在收购方名单，包含战略买方和财务买方。Buyer list, strategic buyers, financial sponsors, M&A target identification.

skills.name: product-management-workflows
skills.description: 产品管理全生命周期工作流，包含 PRD 编写、路线图规划、用户研究、竞品分析、指标追踪。Product management, PRD, roadmap, user research, competitive analysis, metrics.

skills.name: data-analysis-workflows
skills.description: 数据分析全流程工作流，包含数据探索、SQL 查询、可视化、仪表板构建、统计分析。Data analysis, SQL, visualization, dashboard, statistical analysis, plotly.

skills.name: xlsx
skills.description: 处理 Excel 电子表格文件，读取、编辑、创建 xlsx/csv/tsv 文件，添加公式、格式化、制图。Excel spreadsheet, xlsx, csv, formula, data table, chart.

skills.name: docx
skills.description: 处理 Word 文档，创建、读取、编辑 docx 文件，包含目录、标题、表格、页眉。Word document, docx, report, memo, letter.

skills.name: pptx
skills.description: 处理 PowerPoint 演示文稿，创建、读取、编辑 pptx 文件，制作幻灯片、演讲材料。PowerPoint, pptx, presentation, slides, deck, pitch.

skills.name: pdf
skills.description: 处理 PDF 文件，读取、合并、拆分、加水印、OCR 识别、表格提取。PDF processing, merge, split, extract, OCR.

skills.name: competitive-analysis
skills.description: 竞争格局分析，市场定位分析，竞品功能对比，行业竞争态势。Competitive landscape, market positioning, competitive analysis.

skills.name: find-skills
skills.description: 帮助用户发现和安装 agent skills，扩展能力边界。Find and install skills, extend capabilities.

skills.name: skill-creator
skills.description: 创建自定义 skill，扩展 WorkBuddy 能力。Skill creation, custom workflow, skill development.
